description: Diff of sent PDF vs. original docx clearly showed the contact line ('Reach me directly: ...') was removed by David. Applied all other diff changes but missed this one, requiring a second correction.
correction: Remove the contact line entirely from the Next Steps section when syncing PDF edits back to the script.
systemic_fix: When applying a set of diff changes, work through them line by line in order rather than pattern-matching by category. Deletions are easy to miss when rewriting large blocks.
